key.name: library-path
key.summary: Path to the Moments library bundle
key.description: Absolute path to the Moments.library directory. Empty string means no library has been configured yet (first run).

key.name: zoom-level
key.description: Index into the zoom sizes array (0–5). Controls thumbnail density in the photo grid.

key.name: recent-imports-days
key.summary: Number of days to show in Recent Imports
key.description: Items imported within this many days appear in the Recent Imports view. Set to 0 to show all imports.

key.name: originals-cache-max-mb
key.summary: Maximum size of the originals cache in MB
key.description: Downloaded original photos and videos are cached locally for offline access. When the cache exceeds this limit, the oldest files are evicted on library open. Only applies to Immich libraries. Set to 0 to disable eviction.

key.name: color-scheme
key.description: 0 = follow system, 1 = force light, 4 = force dark. Matches AdwColorScheme enum values.

key.name: trash-retention-days
key.description: Items in the trash are automatically deleted after this many days. Only applies to the local backend.

key.name: sync-interval-seconds
key.summary: Immich sync polling interval in seconds
key.description: How often to poll the Immich server for changes. Only applies to Immich libraries. Set to 0 to disable polling.

key.name: album-sort-order
key.description: 0 = most recent photo, 1 = name (A–Z), 2 = date created.

key.name: window-width
key.description: The last-used width of the main window in pixels.

key.name: window-height
key.description: The last-used height of the main window in pixels.

key.name: is-maximized
key.description: Whether the main window was maximized when last closed.
